However, 2277 * 927 = 2111151 which is one less than 2111159. This means that 2111159 is divisible by 3 and 927 * 7 * 11 * 19 = 2111159 - 8 = 2111151. Since 2111159 is divisible by 3, then it is also divisible by 927 * 7 * 11 * 19 + 8 / 3 = 2111151 / 3 + 8/3 = 705371 + 8/3 = 705379 + 2/3 = 705379.333... which is not an integer. However, since 2111159 is divisible by 3, then it is also divisible by 3 * 705379 = 2116157 which is one more than 2111159. This means that 2111159 is divisible by 3 and 705379.
